creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
This is a combined shar, which contains:
	fcitx-chewing  - Chewing input method binding
	fcitx-keyboard - X keyboard integration

	These addons are new to fcitx-4.2.0, as mentioned on the author's blog https://www.csslayer.info/wordpress/fcitx-dev/fcitx-4-2-0/ (Chinese).
	
	This PR depends on PR/164820.
